priority_inventory.title: Date and Time of the 24 Solar Terms
priority_inventory.author: Hong Kong Observatory
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Official timing reference for 24 solar terms.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: Use for validation unless commercial reuse is cleared.

priority_inventory.title: Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches
priority_inventory.author: Hong Kong Observatory
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Official stem/branch and day-stem-to-hour-stem reference.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: Do not bulk-copy tables without rights review.

priority_inventory.title: Gregorian-Lunar Calendar Conversion Table
priority_inventory.author: Hong Kong Observatory
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Official conversion oracle for 1901–2100.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: Validation source, not unrestricted redistribution source.

priority_inventory.title: Rules for the Chinese Calendar
priority_inventory.author: Y. T. Liu
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Best plain-language rule statement for Chinese calendar mechanics.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: Use rules, not page text, in product.

priority_inventory.title: Sexagenary Cycle
priority_inventory.author: Y. T. Liu
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Strong explanation of the sexagenary system for date logic.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: Use as rule reference only.

priority_inventory.title: 24 Solar Terms
priority_inventory.author: Y. T. Liu
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Astronomical explanation of solar terms.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: Rule reference only.

priority_inventory.title: The Equation of Time
priority_inventory.author: U.S. Naval Observatory
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Authoritative support source for true/apparent solar time review.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: Technical reference only.

priority_inventory.title: Open Content Project | Introduction
priority_inventory.author: DILA
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Open academic calendar dataset description.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: CC BY-SA; review downstream obligations.

priority_inventory.title: Open Content Project | Downloads
priority_inventory.author: DILA
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Download source for Chinese-only historical calendar data.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: CC BY-SA; review compatibility.

priority_inventory.title: Buddhist Studies Authority Databases
priority_inventory.author: DILA
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Repository mirror with explicit license statement.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: CC BY-SA 3.0; review before reuse.

priority_inventory.title: GB/T 33661-2017 Calculation and promulgation of the Chinese calendar
priority_inventory.author: SAMR / SAC
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Official standard record for modern Chinese calendar rules.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: Standard text is copyrighted; use as normative reference.

priority_inventory.title: stem-branch
priority_inventory.author: h4x0r
priority_inventory.reliability_note: Apache-2.0 astronomical engine with explicit accuracy claims.
priority_inventory.copyright_note: Verify embedded lookup content before reuse.

priority_inventory.title: San ming tong hui
priority_inventory.author: 萬民英

priority_inventory.copyright_note: CText quotation limits apply.
